2605.10176.title: When Prompts Become Payloads: A Framework for Mitigating SQL Injection Attacks in Large Language Model-Driven Applications
2605.10176.paper_summary: Natural language interfaces to structured databases are becoming increasingly common, largely due to advances in large language models (LLMs) that enable users to query data using conversational input rather than formal query languages such as SQL. While this paradigm significantly improves usability and accessibility, it introduces new security risks, particularly the amplification of SQL injection vulnerabilities through the prompt-to-SQL translation process. Malicious users can exploit these mechanisms by crafting adversarial prompts that manipulate model behavior and generate unsafe queries. In this work, we propose a multi-layered security framework designed to detect and mitigate LLM-mediated SQL injection attacks. The framework integrates a front-end security shield for prompt sanitization, an advanced threat detection model for behavioral and semantic anomaly identification, and a signature-based control layer for known attack patterns. We evaluate the proposed framework under diverse and realistic attack scenarios, including prompt injection, obfuscated SQL payloads, and context-manipulation attacks. To ensure robustness, we generate and curate a comprehensive benchmark dataset of adversarial prompts and assess performance across a fine-tuned LLM configuration. Experimental results demonstrate that the proposed approach achieves high detection accuracy while maintaining low false-positive rates, significantly improving the secure deployment of LLM-powered database applications.
2605.10176.paper_summary_zh: 自然語言介面與結構化資料庫之間的連結變得越來越普遍，這主要歸功於大型語言模型（LLMs）的進步，使得用戶能夠使用對話式輸入來查詢數據，而不是使用像 SQL 這樣的正式查詢語言。<lb/>雖然這一範式顯著改善了可用性和可及性，但它也引入了新的安全風險，特別是通過提示到 SQL 的翻譯過程放大了 SQL 注入漏洞。<lb/>惡意用戶可以利用這些機制，通過精心設計的對抗性提示來操縱模型行為並生成不安全的查詢。<lb/>在這項工作中，我們提出了一個多層次的安全框架，旨在檢測和減輕 LLM 介導的 SQL 注入攻擊。<lb/>該框架整合了一個前端安全防護罩，用於提示清理，一個先進的威脅檢測模型，用於行為和語義異常識別，以及一個基於簽名的控制層，用於已知攻擊模式。<lb/>我們在多樣化且現實的攻擊場景下評估了所提出的框架，包括提示注入、混淆的 SQL 載荷和上下文操縱攻擊。<lb/>為了確保穩健性，我們生成並策劃了一個全面的對抗性提示基準數據集，並評估在微調的 LLM 配置下的性能。<lb/>實驗結果表明，所提出的方法在保持低假陽性率的同時實現了高檢測準確率，顯著改善了 LLM 驅動的數據庫應用的安全部署。
2605.10176.author: Farzad Nourmohammadzadeh Motlagh et.al.
2605.10176.authors: Farzad Nourmohammadzadeh Motlagh, Mehrdad Hajizadeh, Mehryar Majd, Pejman Najafi, Feng Cheng, Christoph Meinel
